title: Ice Cream Mondae
description: Keep playing on vanilla servers with fresh looks and utilities. Fully vanilla compatible clientpack drizzled with optimizations and handy tools and sprinkled with a few audio and graphics delights. FORMERLY VANILLA BEAN SPECK
body:
## A New Day for Familiar Worlds

A beautiful and handy clientpack for vanilla servers with your friends! Ice Cream Mondae stays fundamentally vanilla with a selection of curated toppings like Distant Horizons, Xaero's World Map, MouseTweaks, and more!

Modded worlds and playthroughs can be fun, but often hard to share with friends or find active servers for. Vanilla on the other hand, never fully goes out of style. So why not try a 100% vanilla compatible treat filled with refinements large and small that bring fresh life to a familiar flavor.

This is the lighter weight version of [Ice Cream Sundae](https://modrinth.com/modpack/icecreamsundae); which has a few more sound and graphics changes, including a small, performant shader.

The exact modlist will vary as mod support for different versions changes, but the core features Ice Cream Mondae is built around should remain constant. **This pack shouldn't break cheating standards, but be sure to check with your servers!**

## Features

- See vistas farther than ever with Distant Horizons.
- Open a worldmap of your travels with **','**, and right click to place markers and reminders!
- Build easier than ever with click-and-drag block placing, and optional hotbar shuffling for fancy mixes and textures, toggled by 'g' and 'r' respectively.
- Handle storage better with clicking through signs and item frames, middle-click sorting, and shift-click-and-drag stack movement between inventories.
- Hear new sounds from biomes and inventories.
- Copy screenshots to your clipboard automatically, keep your tools from breaking, right click to harvest and replant crops, build with litematica, and so many more!
- If your server supports it, we even include Simple Voice Chat with extras, Elytra Trims, and support for Armored Elytra!

## Mods

Here's a master list of pertinent mods in rough order of what you should know in addition to all the optimization you've come to expect from clientpacks like [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)!

<details>
<summary>Modlist</summary>

- Simple Voice Chat (for servers that support it) (press 'v')
- Accurate Block Placement (toggle 'g')
- Lighty (press 'f7', 'f8')
- LibrGetter ('/librget')
- litematica ('m')
- Xaeros World Map (remapped to ',') (plus waypoints)
- Distant Horizons
- Screenshot to Clipboard
- Clickthrough
- Mouse Tweaks
- Client Sort
- Shuffle
- Elytra Trims (for servers that support it)
- ClientHarvest (right click to harvest)
- Anti Item Break
- No Strip
- EasierVillagerTrading
- Emoji Type
- Armored Elytra
- Shulker Box Tooltip
- Name Pain
- AppleSkin
- Antighost
- Clean f3
- Sneaky Screens
- ItemPhysic Lite
- Talk Balloons
- Pet Owner
- Map Tooltip
- ClearDespawn
- Dynamic FPS
- Sound Physics Perfected
- Better Third Person
- Status Effect Timer
- Omega Mute
- Screenshot Organization
- AmbientSounds
- Handful
- Sounds
- Smooth Swapping
- Chat Heads
- Dense Flowers
- I See My Armored Hand
- Cool Rain
- Ambient Environment
- Screenshot Compression
- Seamless Loading Screen

</details>




---

Vanilla Bean Pack uses [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) as its base for performance and visual refinements.

Textures sourced from [Faithful](https://faithfulpack.net/)
Accurate Block Placement from [ABP-Reborn](https://github.com/hschwar/AccurateBlockPlacement-Reborn/releases)
